data.title: Carbonxt Group Ltd. Updates Securities Issue Plan
data.description:
An update from Carbonxt Group Ltd. ( (AU:CG1) ) is now available.

Carbonxt Group Ltd. has announced an update regarding its proposed securities issue, extending the Securities Purchase Plan (SPP) deadline to March 27, 2025, and updating the details of the underwriters. This extension and update aim to provide more flexibility and clarity for stakeholders, potentially enhancing investor confidence and aligning with strategic financial goals.

More about Carbonxt Group Ltd.

Carbonxt Group Ltd. operates in the environmental technology industry, focusing on the development and supply of activated carbon products. These products are primarily used for air and water purification, catering to industries that require emissions control and environmental compliance solutions.

data.title: Aeris Resources Appoints Dane Van Heerden as New CFO
data.description:
An announcement from Aeris Resources Limited ( (AU:AIS) ) is now available.

Aeris Resources Limited has appointed Ms. Dane Van Heerden as the new Chief Financial Officer, following her role as Acting CFO since August 2024. With over a decade of experience at Aeris, her leadership and financial expertise are expected to positively impact the company’s strategic and financial outcomes. The appointment comes as Mr. Rob Brainsbury, the former CFO, remains on extended leave and will transition to a new role upon his return.

More about Aeris Resources Limited

Aeris Resources is a mid-tier producer of base and precious metals, with a focus on copper. The company operates two assets, maintains a mine, and is involved in a long-life development project and exploration. Aeris is committed to growth through organic projects, exploration, and strategic mergers and acquisitions, supported by a skilled board and management team.

data.title: Elixir Energy Secures $7 Million in Share Placement, Launches SPP
data.description:
Elixir Energy Limited ( (AU:EXR) ) has issued an announcement.

Elixir Energy Limited has announced a successful placement of 199.5 million shares to raise $7 million, with additional options issued to investors. The company is also offering an SPP to eligible shareholders to raise up to $2 million, with funds primarily allocated for drilling an appraisal well in ATP 2056. This strategic move aims to bolster the company’s operational capabilities and enhance its market position in the energy sector.

More about Elixir Energy Limited

Elixir Energy Limited is an energy company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: EXR). The company is involved in the exploration and development of energy resources, with a focus on drilling and appraisal activities.

data.title: AustChina Holdings Reports Half-Year Loss and Strategic Developments
data.description:
AustChina Holdings Limited ( (AU:AUH) ) has provided an update.

AustChina Holdings Limited reported a loss of $670,503 for the half-year ending December 2024, compared to a loss of $374,779 in the previous year. The company is strategically focusing on exploring alternative technologies for its Blackall Coal Project and reviewing mineral resource investment opportunities. Additionally, AustChina has entered a binding agreement to potentially acquire the Chenene Lithium Project in Tanzania, aiming to enhance its project portfolio and generate cash flow in the short to medium term.

More about AustChina Holdings Limited

AustChina Holdings Limited operates in the energy and resources sector, focusing on exploration and investment. The company is involved in projects that explore alternative technologies for coal utilization and invests in mineral resource-based projects to create shareholder value.

Current Market Cap: A$2.75M

data.title: Entrée Resources Secures Arbitration Win and Amends Joint Venture Agreement
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Entree Gold ( (TSE:ETG) ).

Entrée Resources Ltd. has announced its fiscal year 2024 results, highlighting a significant arbitration victory against its joint venture partner Oyu Tolgoi LLC and Turquoise Hill Resources Ltd. The arbitration tribunal ruled in favor of Entrée on all issues, leading to the formal execution of the Entrée/Oyu Tolgoi Joint Venture Agreement. This agreement, which dates back to 2008, has been amended to include the Shivee West Property, previously wholly owned by Entrée, now assigned to Oyu Tolgoi LLC with an 80% or 70% beneficial interest. This development marks a crucial step in the company’s operations and strengthens its position within the joint venture, impacting its strategic interests and obligations in the Mongolian mining sector.

More about Entree Gold

Entrée Resources Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on mineral exploration and development. The company is involved in joint ventures and partnerships to explore and develop mining properties, particularly in Mongolia.

YTD Price Performance: -10.71%

Average Trading Volume: 18,626

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $317.5M

data.title: Infinity Mining Limited Announces Quotation of New Securities
data.description:
Infinity Mining Limited ( (AU:IMI) ) has issued an announcement.

Infinity Mining Limited has announced the issuance of 2,000,000 fully paid ordinary securities to be quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the code IMI. This move is part of a previously announced transaction, potentially enhancing the company’s liquidity and market presence, which could have implications for its stakeholders and industry positioning.

Infinity Mining Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in the extraction and production of various minerals, positioning itself to meet market demands in the mining sector.

data.title: Silver North Resources Launches $1.5M Private Placement to Boost Yukon Silver Project
data.description:
An announcement from Alianza Minerals ( (TSE:SNAG) ) is now available.

Silver North Resources Ltd. announced a non-brokered private placement to raise $1,500,000, which will be used to advance its Haldane Silver Project in the Yukon Territory. The project has shown promising results with the discovery of parallel silver mineralized veins, and the funds will support further exploration activities, including geophysical surveys and additional drilling. The company’s Tim project, under option to Coeur Mining Inc., is also progressing, with pending analytical results from a recent drill program. This financing move is expected to bolster Silver North’s exploration efforts and strengthen its position in the silver mining sector.

More about Alianza Minerals

Silver North Resources Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on silver exploration and development. The company is engaged in advancing projects such as the Haldane Silver Project in the Yukon Territory and the Tim project, which is under option to Coeur Mining Inc. Silver North aims to explore and develop high-grade silver deposits, leveraging its geological expertise and strategic partnerships.

YTD Price Performance: 11.11%

Average Trading Volume: 45,959

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$4.77M
